payload.insight: The plan is fully executable as the agent can successfully navigate the environment and interact with all specified objects. The agent is able to access the cabinet by crouching, with the required interaction distance of 0.30m falling well within its 0.70m reach limit, and maintains a clear line of sight to the TV stand while seated on the sofa. This confirms that the scene layout and object placements are functionally compatible with the agent's physical capabilities and range of motion.
